title: Aurora, 33924, Palm Pals Usagi Sea Bunny 5In, Soft Toy, White & Black
features: Introducing the Palm Pals Usagi Sea Bunny Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable Sea bunny is a white and black-coloured plush. It's filled with beans and perfectly fits into your palm. It's great for small cuddling and makes a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Usagi Sea Bunny is part of the Palm Pals Aquatic collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Critters, Zoo, Barn and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and feature inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

The Palm Pals Usagi Sea Bunny, suitable from birth, measures 13cm. Usagi's squishiness is just a fluffy reflection of her tender and sweet heart! She prefers the simple joys of life, like listening to the soothing sound of ocean waves. And being squishy, she doesn't mind if you need a place to rest your head! This squishy sea bunny is sure to win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
